ai/agents.title: AI Agents
ai/agents.content:
AI Agents
An AI Agent is a software system that can:

Observe its environment
Reason about a task
Take actions
Learn from results

Architecture
User
  ↓
Planner
  ↓
Executor
  ↓
Tools
  ↓
Result
Agent Components
LLM
Responsible for reasoning and decision making.
Memory
Stores:

Conversation history
User preferences
Long-term knowledge

Tools
Examples:

Search Engine
Database
Python Runtime
GitHub API

Related Notes

rag
docker

Example
A GitHub Research Agent can:

Clone repositories
Read files
Summarize code
Generate documentation

ai/rag.title: Retrieval Augmented Generation
ai/rag.content:
RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)
RAG combines:

Vector Search
Knowledge Base
Large Language Models

      ↓

      ↓

      ↓

Local Files

LLM
Examples:

GPT

Reduced hallucination
Uses private data
More accurate answers

linux/docker.title: Docker Basics
linux/docker.content:
Docker
Docker is a platform for packaging applications into containers.
Why Docker?
Benefits:

Reproducible environments
Easy deployment
Dependency isolation

Basic Commands
Pull Image
docker pull nginx
Run Container
docker run -d -p 80:80 nginx
List Containers
docker ps
Remove Container
docker rm -f container_id
Volumes
Volumes allow data persistence.
docker volume create mydata
Mount volume:
docker run -v mydata:/data nginx
Related Notes
